span.p:
G1 (top claim)
Within the defined KITTI-like ODD and stated assumptions,
the perception monitor provides evidence-backed detection of
degraded perception conditions and requests degraded/fail-safe
handling within the 40 ms budget

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
C1: ODD — daylight, clear weather,
KITTI-like scenes (project_spec.md §2)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
C3: Thresholds frozen from KITTI val
only (monitor_thresholds.json, EXP-008)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
S1: Argue over hazard analysis,
baseline evidence, runtime monitor,
verification, and residual-risk management

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
G2: Hazards and unsafe control
actions are identified and drive
the safety requirements

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
G3: Detector baseline quality
in-ODD is measured and sufficient
for monitored operation

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
G4: Runtime monitor detects degraded
conditions and requests fallback
(SR-01..SR-05)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
G5: End-to-end latency meets the
40 ms budget with monitor active
(SR-06)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
G6: Requirements are verified with
reproducible scripted evidence and
full traceability

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Sn2: Baseline metrics — mAP50 0.859 val,
TRT FP16 delta −0.002
(baseline_metrics.csv, EXP-003/004)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Sn4: OOD AUROC night 0.982, rain 0.876,
fog 0.926; risk-coverage at Q95
(ood_metrics.csv, risk_coverage.csv,
EXP-007/008)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Sn5: Gating 7/7 scenarios, zero false
transitions on ID; logging 15/15 checks
(gating_tests.csv, monitor_log_check.csv,
EXP-009)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Sn6: Latency p95 17.2 ms TRT /
17.5 ms PyTorch, all fault conditions
within budget (monitor_latency_metrics.csv,
EXP-009/010)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Sn7: Fault injection — fog:high 99%
flagged as mAP collapses to 0.07
(fault_injection_metrics.csv, EXP-010)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Sn8: Verification report + traceability
SR-01..06 verified
(verification_report.md,
traceability_matrix.csv)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
R1 (residual risk)
Low-light recall erosion (−19% mAP50)
passes 97.7% NOMINAL — SOTIF
unknown-unsafe residual; plus no
closed-loop vehicle validation (A-03)
